events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: PPE selection, respirator wrong cartridge color (ID). This means the respirator has an incorrect cartridge for the hazard. Wrong cartridge color indicates wrong cartridge type for the contaminant. This is non-compliant with OSHA 1910.134 and Subpart I. Decision: fail. Risk: high (wrong respiratory protection could expose worker). Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant. Percent complete: rough-complete, maybe 80. Confidence high.
